src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/C.general_idea: Replace the colon-space delimiter with a semicolon in the counter output string format.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/H.general_idea: Refactor the appending of newlines around split markers to respect 'newlines' and 'minify' configuration flags.
src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/H.human_impl:
header.append("
<!-- start split -->"); if (newlines) header.append("

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/H.general_idea: Add a new field to store the output directory path separately from the filename.
Replace dynamic extraction of the directory from the filename with the explicit outputDir field to allow independent configuration.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/S.general_idea: Introduce support for specifying an output directory via command line argument with validation.
Wrap ZipFile usage in try-with-resources to ensure proper closure and prevent resource leaks.
Wrap InputStreams from ZipFile in try-with-resources to ensure proper closure.
Wrap FileInputStream and related streams in try-with-resources for direct file parsing.
Explicitly specify UTF-8 encoding when creating InputStreamReader to fix character encoding issues.
Pass an InputSource wrapping the Reader to SAXParser instead of a raw InputStream to ensure correct encoding handling.
Move filename assignment after Timer.log start to ensure timing accuracy or logical flow.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/W.general_idea: Explicitly specify UTF-8 charset for OutputStreamWriter to ensure consistent encoding across different environments.
Add import for StandardCharsets to support explicit charset specification.
Extract outputStream into a class field to manage its lifecycle alongside bufferedWriter.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/X.general_idea: Remove hardcoded license expiration logic and associated date parsing imports to clean up the main method.
src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/X.human_impl: Removed SimpleDateFormat/Date imports and the block checking if '2025-12-31' is before current date.

src/main/java/com/fractalshot/xmlsplit/X.general_idea: Add a new command-line option to specify the output directory for split files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler configuration to target Java 21 using the modern 'release' flag instead of separate source/target properties.
Move distribution creation logic (Launch4j, Zip) into a dedicated Maven profile to separate concerns.
Remove the Launch4j executable generation step from the build process.
Refactor PowerShell commands for zipping and renaming artifacts to use explicit -Command arguments for better reliability.
Add project name, description, and packaging type to POM metadata.
Explicitly configure UTF-8 encoding for source and reporting to ensure consistent character handling.

.vscode/launch.json.general_idea: Update the default command-line arguments in the VS Code launch configuration to include output path and formatting options.
